result.stdout:
USAGE: myriad [--help] --inputfile <string> [--outputfile <string>]
              [--configfile <string>] [--configkey <string>] [--plugin <string>]
              [--wait-for-debugger] [--verbose]
              [--additionalparams <key>=<value>] [--inlinegeneration]
              [--generator-filter [<string>...]]

OPTIONS:

    --inputfile <string>  Specify a file to use as input.
    --outputfile <string> Specify the file name that the generated code will be
                          written to.
    --configfile <string> Specify a myriad.toml file to use as config.
    --configkey <string>  Specify a key in the config that will be passed to
                          the generator.
    --plugin <string>     Register an assembly plugin.
    --wait-for-debugger   Wait for the debugger to attach.
    --verbose             Verbose output.
    --additionalparams <key>=<value>
                          Specify additional parameters.
    --inlinegeneration    Generate code for the input file at the end of the
                          input file.
    --generator-filter [<string>...]
                          A list of generators to run, only the specifid
                          generators will be run, all others will be ignored.
    --help                display this list of options.
